package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for background_jobs_registered_from_gin_packages_instead_of_bootstrap: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Scheduler or worker registration hidden inside Gin transport packages.
type CaseBackgroundJobsRegisteredFromGinPackagesInsteadOfBootstrapDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBackgroundJobsRegisteredFromGinPackagesInsteadOfBootstrapModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBackgroundJobsRegisteredFromGinPackagesInsteadOfBootstrapRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBackgroundJobsRegisteredFromGinPackagesInsteadOfBootstrapModel
}

type CaseBackgroundJobsRegisteredFromGinPackagesInsteadOfBootstrapService struct {
    repo *CaseBackgroundJobsRegisteredFromGinPackagesInsteadOfBootstrapRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBackgroundJobsRegisteredFromGinPackagesInsteadOfBootstrapAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveBackgroundJobsRegisteredFromGinPackagesInsteadOfBootstrap(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBackgroundJobsRegisteredFromGinPackagesInsteadOfBootstrapDTO) error {
    go func() {
        ticker := time.NewTicker(24 * time.Hour)
        defer ticker.Stop()
        for range ticker.C {
            db.Where("status = ?", "expired").Delete(&CaseBackgroundJobsRegisteredFromGinPackagesInsteadOfBootstrapModel{})
        }
    }()
    go func() {
        ticker := time.NewTicker(7 * 24 * time.Hour)
        defer ticker.Stop()
        for range ticker.C {
            fmt.Println("exporting weekly report")
        }
    }()
    return nil
}
